description: This component is auto generated when importing new font files.

fields.URL: The location of where to load the font from.
fields.Padding: How many pixels of padding should be used between letters in the font.
fields.PixelRange: Sets the distance field range in output pixels.
fields.GlyphEmSize: Sets the size of the glyphs in the atlas in pixels per em.
fields.MipMaps: Whether to display lower res versions of the font when it is further away to save on performance.
fields.MipMapFiltering: How to filter transitions between mipmaps when it is viewed at incremental distances further away.
fields.LODBias: Whether to see lower res versions at smaller distances to save performance.

usage: This component is auto generated when importing new font files. Simply find a font file (.TTF or similar) and drop it into the Resonite game window or import through the file browser in the dash. The game will then generate this component on a font object, with the ``URL`` field filled with a valid font resource.
